description.en: Travellers who book accommodation via airbnb.com or the mobile app. Pay nightly rate + cleaning fee + ~14% Airbnb service fee + local taxes. Reviews + ratings substitute for the brand trust hotels have. Airbnb takes the entire payment upfront and pays the host 24 hours after check-in — generating float that scales with bookings.
description.zh: 通过 airbnb.com 或 App 订房的旅行者。每晚租金 + 清洁费 + 约 14% Airbnb 服务费 + 当地税。评分与评论替代了酒店的品牌信任。Airbnb 提前一次性收下全部款项,客人入住 24 小时后才把钱给房东 —— 产生与订单量同步增长的 Float。
